titles.title: If You Only Knew The Blessings

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: If you only knew the blessings That salvation brings You will never, never stay away; If you only saw the table Spread with lovely things You would come to the feast today

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For the door is opened wide And the Saviour bids you come There is nothing you have to pay So be wise and step inside And do not be like some Who have thrown their last chance away
